title: Spa Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of a spa facility. Coordinate programs, schedule and direct staff, and oversee financial activities.

tasks.text: Respond to customer inquiries or complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule guest appointments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain client databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate facility schedules to maximize usage and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform accounting duties, such as recording daily cash flow, preparing bank deposits, or generating financial statements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor operations to ensure compliance with applicable health, safety, or hygiene standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan or direct spa services and programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement marketing strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sell products, services, or memberships.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recruit, interview, or hire employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess employee performance and suggest ways to improve work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inventory products and order new supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish spa budgets and financial goals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform staff of job responsibilities, performance expectations, client service standards, or corporate policies and guidelines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train staff in the use or sale of products, programs, or activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in continuing education classes to maintain current knowledge of industry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct facility maintenance or repair.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify staff credentials, such as educational and certification requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule staff or supervise scheduling.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check spa equipment to ensure proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop staff service or retail goals and guide staff in goal achievement.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
